comments.author: r4ining
comments.body:
Find a way to serve the model running, but not vllm omni

```bash
# launch container
docker run -itd --name qwen3-omni-30b-a3b-instruct-vllm \
    -v /data/model:/data/model \
    -e TZ=Asia/Shanghai \
    --ipc=host \
    --network host \
    --shm-size 50G \
    --gpus all \
    --privileged \
    --cap-add=IPC_LOCK \
    --cap-add=SYS_ADMIN \
    --cap-add=SYS_NICE \
    --ulimit memlock=-1 \
    --ulimit stack=67108864 \
    --restart unless-stopped \
    --entrypoint /bin/bash \
    vllm/vllm-openai:v0.24.0

docker exec -it qwen3-omni-30b-a3b-instruct-vllm bash

# install dependencies
pip install 'vllm[audio]' -i https://pypi.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn/simple
# launch model
vllm serve /data/model/Qwen3-Omni-30B-A3B-Instruct \
  --tensor-parallel-size 4 \
  --served-model-name qwen3-omni-30b-a3b-instruct \
  --dtype bfloat16 \
  --gpu-memory-utilization 0.9 \
  --enable-prefix-caching \
  --enable-prompt-tokens-details \
  --allowed-local-media-path / \
  --trust-remote-code \
  --host 0.0.0.0 \
  --port 8901
```

test model
```bash
curl http://localhost:8901/v1/chat/completions \
    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
    -d '{
    "messages": [
    {"role": "system", "content": "You are a helpful assistant."},
    {"role": "user", "content": [
        {"type": "image_url", "image_url": {"url": "https://qianwen-res.oss-cn-beijing.aliyuncs.com/Qwen3-Omni/demo/cars.jpg"}},
        {"type": "audio_url", "audio_url": {"url": "https://qianwen-res.oss-cn-beijing.aliyuncs.com/Qwen3-Omni/demo/cough.wav"}},
        {"type": "text", "text": "What can you see and hear? Answer in one sentence."}
    ]}
    ]
    }'
{"id":"chatcmpl-af11a07f80a9bdae","object":"chat.completion","created":1783668369,"model":"qwen3-omni-30b-a3b-instruct","choices":[{"index":0,"message":{"role":"assist

comments.author: amy-why-3459
comments.body:
The correct mapping should be:
```
(APIServer pid=936876) INFO 07-10 02:28:14 [stage_runtime.py:550] [stage_init] Stage-0 set runtime devices: 0,1,2,3
(APIServer pid=936876) INFO 07-10 02:28:14 [stage_utils.py:167] Stage 1 logical-to-physical device mapping: 0->0
(APIServer pid=936876) INFO 07-10 02:28:14 [stage_utils.py:167] Stage 2 logical-to-physical device mapping: 1->1
(APIServer pid=936876) INFO 07-10 02:28:14 [stage_runtime.py:550] [stage_init] Stage-1 set runtime devices: 0
(APIServer pid=936876) INFO 07-10 02:28:14 [stage_runtime.py:550] [stage_init] Stage-2 set runtime devices: 1
```

The actual mapping is as follows:
```
(APIServer pid=255) INFO 07-10 15:49:24 [stage_runtime.py:550] [stage_init] Stage-0 set runtime devices: 0
(APIServer pid=255) INFO 07-10 15:49:24 [stage_runtime.py:550] [stage_init] Stage-1 set runtime devices: 1
INFO 07-10 15:49:35 [patch.py:252] NVFP4 W4A4 weight_scale NaN-clamp: installed.
```
